title: Fresh Vanilla Textures
description: The renewed Minecraft vanilla texture pack with Fresh vanilla texture pack is compatible with all versions 1.13 and below!
body: This texture pack brings new looks to older versions of Minecraft! It's currently available for 1.8.9 but we plan to release it to all versions soon! This texture pack has no additional textures added, it is completely vanilla and compatible with optifine! If you like combined glass, it is recommended to install optifine! If you ask why I should download it, 1.14 is an old version and those who are new to the game are used to the new textures. Thanks to this texture pack, new textures are brought to the old versions!
